name: Smart India Hackathon 2026
column10: India's largest national-level hackathon organized by the Government of India. Teams solve real problems submitted by ministries and PSUs.

name: HackMIT 2026
description: One of the most prestigious student hackathons hosted by MIT. Open to university students globally. 24-hour event with mentors from top tech companies.

name: Google Solution Challenge 2026
description: Annual challenge for GDSC members to build solutions addressing the UN's 17 Sustainable Development Goals using Google technologies.

name: MLH Global Hack Week AI Edition
description: A week-long virtual hackathon by Major League Hacking focused on AI and machine learning. Beginner-friendly tracks make this perfect for first-time hackers.

name: Devfolio Hack Summit 2026
description: A flagship hackathon by Devfolio bringing together student developers across India to build full-stack web applications.

name: CyberPatriot National Youth Cyber Defense
description: Students defend virtual networks against simulated cyberattacks. Excellent for beginners exploring network security and ethical hacking.

name: IEEE Xtreme 20.0
description: A global 24-hour online competitive programming challenge organized by IEEE. Open to all IEEE student members.

name: HackCBS 9.0
description: One of Delhi's largest student-run hackathons. Multiple problem tracks and travel stipends for outstation participants.

name: ETHIndia 2026
description: Asia's largest Ethereum hackathon. Build decentralized apps and blockchain infrastructure with huge prize pool.

name: Flipkart Grid 8.0
description: Flipkart's national engineering campus challenge. Winners get Pre-Placement Offers at Flipkart.

name: HackTheBox University CTF 2026
description: A Capture The Flag competition exclusively for university students. Challenges span web exploitation and cryptography.

name: Flutter Puzzle Hack 2026
description: Google and Flutter's official global hackathon. Judged on creativity UI polish and innovative use of the framework.

name: Microsoft Imagine Cup 2026
description: Microsoft's premier global student technology competition. Build AI-powered solutions with access to Azure credits and mentors.

name: Amazon ML Challenge 2026
description: Amazon's annual machine learning competition. Solve complex ML problems with real Amazon datasets.

name: ACM ICPC Asia Regional 2026
description: The most prestigious competitive programming contest for university students qualifying for ICPC World Finals.

name: TreeHacks 2026
description: Stanford University's flagship hackathon. Focus on high-impact projects addressing climate health and education.

name: HackGT 12
description: Georgia Tech's large-scale student hackathon welcoming over 1000 participants with sponsor APIs and hardware.

name: PennApps XXV
description: One of the original college hackathons hosted by University of Pennsylvania. 36-hour event since 2009.

name: HackNYU 2026
description: New York University's signature hackathon across three global campuses. Beginner-friendly with themed tracks.

name: TCS CodeVita Season 13
description: TCS's global coding contest. Top performers earn Pre-Placement Offers at Tata Consultancy Services.

name: HackerEarth AI/ML Hackathon
description: A month-long online hackathon focused on machine learning and AI use cases with real-world datasets.

name: NASA Space Apps Challenge 2026
description: International hackathon using open NASA data for Earth space science aeronautics challenges across 300+ cities.

name: AngelHack Global Hackathon 2026
description: AngelHack connects developers to build startups in 24 hours across 20+ cities with investor network access.

name: Meta Hacker Cup 2026
description: Meta's annual international programming competition spanning multiple rounds from Qualification to Finals.

name: HackUPC 2026
description: One of Europe's largest student hackathons by Polytechnic University of Catalonia with travel reimbursements.

name: Junction 2026
description: Europe's leading hackathon in Helsinki Finland with 1500 hackers and top global company partners.

name: MLH Localhost Cybersecurity
description: Beginner-focused cybersecurity weekend by Major League Hacking. Learn ethical hacking and earn MLH certifications.

name: Kaggle AI Report Competition 2026
description: Kaggle's flagship annual data science challenge. Build the best predictive model on real-world datasets.

name: Infosys Hackathon InfyTQ 2026
description: Infosys campus innovation challenge. Top performers receive internship offers and Certified Developer badges.

name: Google Summer of Code 2026
description: Google's annual program where students contribute to open-source organizations over 3 months for a stipend.

name: Global Game Jam 2026
description: World's largest game creation event. Build a playable game in 48 hours across 100+ countries.

name: picoCTF 2026
description: Carnegie Mellon's beginner-friendly CTF competition. The best entry point into competitive cybersecurity.

name: Hack The Valley 8
description: University of Toronto Scarborough's flagship 24-hour hackathon fostering creativity and technical innovation.

name: MLH Fellowship Kickoff Hackathon
description: MLH fellowship program kickoff. High performers get invited to a 12-week paid remote internship alternative.

name: HackerEarth Frontend Challenge
description: Month-long challenge building beautiful accessible and performant web interfaces with clean code and documentation.

name: ACM-W Celebration of Women in Computing
description: ACM-W annual hackathon celebrating women in computing. Open to all genders with mentorship and social good projects.

name: Hack36 MNNIT Allahabad
description: MNNIT Allahabad's inter-college hackathon with 500+ hackers across HealthTech EdTech FinTech tracks.

name: Myntra HackerRamp WeForShe 2026
description: Myntra campus hackathon for fashion technology. Build ML solutions for personalization and visual search.

name: OpenAI Developer Day Hackathon 2026
description: Official OpenAI hackathon. Build novel applications using GPT-4 DALL-E or Whisper APIs judged on creativity.

name: StudentHack IX Manchester
description: University of Manchester student hackathon open to students across Europe with beginner-friendly workshops.

name: GreatUniHack 2026
description: University of Manchester inter-university hackathon with hardware challenges workshops and sponsor prizes.

name: Hack For Good GitHub Dev.to
description: Online hackathon by GitHub and Dev.to for open-source social good tools. Projects must be public repositories.
